ast.name: ariaLabel

ast.name: info

ast.target: 正在执行响应式能力检查...

ast.name: info
ast.source: Cleanup orphaned data triggered by user command.

ast.source: Adapter does not support rename-over-existing; using swap fallback.

ast.target: 文件日志记录已被设置禁用。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Environment settings changed, resetting caches and DB connection.
ast.target: 环境设置已更改，正在重置缓存和数据库连接。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Statistics DB not found via walk-up heuristic.
ast.target: 通过向上遍历启发式未找到统计数据库。

ast.name: info
ast.source: KOReader stats DB changed on device. Reloading in-memory DB.
ast.target: 设备上的 KOReader 统计数据库已更改。正在重新加载内存数据库。

ast.source: All disposable instances cleared; container disposed.
ast.target: 所有可处置实例已清除；容器已处置。

ast.target: 所有同步迁移已成功应用。

ast.target: 正在将旧版设置迁移到新的数据存储。

ast.target: KOReader 导入器：索引修复成功。

ast.target: 正在启动 KOReader 高亮导入流程…

ast.target: 正在释放所有托管数据库...

ast.target: 设置已更改：索引缓存已失效

ast.source: Building degraded scan cache by pre-scanning the vault...

ast.name: info
ast.target: 所有服务均已成功初始化。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Settings saved. Services notified of changes.
ast.target: 设置已保存。服务已收到更改通知。

ast.name: log
ast.target: KOReader 导入器：索引修复成功。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the same action for all subsequent items during this run.
ast.target: 在本次运行期间，对所有后续项目使用相同的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls verbosity of logs. 'None' is off, 'Info' is most verbose.
ast.target: 控制日志的详细程度。“无”表示关闭，“信息”表示最详细。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write debug logs to a file in your vault.
ast.target: 将调试日志写入保险库中的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Debug logs will be written to this folder.
ast.target: 调试日志将写入此文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Makes the plugin forget which books have been imported. Notes are NOT deleted.
ast.target: 使插件忘记哪些书籍已被导入。笔记不会被删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Resets import status and immediately starts a new import.
ast.target: 重置导入状态并立即开始新的导入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Deletes the plugin's data and reloads it.
ast.target: 删除插件的数据并重新加载它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-check for things like vault write permissions.
ast.target: 重新检查保险库写入权限等事项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between HTML or MD style comments for tracking imported highlights.
ast.target: 选择用于跟踪导入高亮的 HTML 或 MD 风格注释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Convert highlight files to use the selected comment style.
ast.target: 将高亮文件转换为使用所选的注释风格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove tracking comments from notes marked as 'completed' (readingStatus: completed).
ast.target: 从标记为“已完成”（readingStatus: completed）的笔记中移除跟踪注释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Backups are created automatically before KOReader notes are changed. To restore one, right-click a highlight note or use the Command Palette command 'KOReader: Restore note from backup'. Set to 0 to disable the limit.
ast.target: 在 KOReader 笔记被更改前会自动创建备份。要恢复备份，请右键单击高亮笔记或使用命令面板命令“KOReader: 从备份恢复笔记”。设置为 0 可禁用限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Root folder to scan for KOReader .sdr directories (usually your device mount).
ast.target: 扫描 KOReader .sdr 目录的根文件夹（通常是您的设备挂载点）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional: Directly specify the path to statistics.sqlite3 file. Leave empty for automatic detection.
ast.target: 可选：直接指定 statistics.sqlite3 文件的路径。留空以自动检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder to save highlight notes.
ast.target: 用于保存高亮笔记的保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies when the local index is not persistent. Longer time scans more files but may slow the import.
ast.target: 当本地索引非持久化时应用。更长的时间会扫描更多文件，但可能会减慢导入速度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define a custom naming scheme for imported highlight notes.
ast.target: 为导入的高亮笔记定义自定义命名方案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which fields to include or exclude from frontmatter.
ast.target: 选择要包含或排除在 frontmatter 中的字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to handle Keywords: 'None', 'Duplicate' (add Tags), or 'Replace' (convert to Tags).
ast.target: 选择如何处理关键词：“无”、“复制”（添加标签）或“替换”（转换为标签）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When an author is not found, use 'Unknown Author' instead of omitting the field.
ast.target: 当找不到作者时，使用“未知作者”代替省略该字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically merge imports if they only add new highlights, without showing a dialog.
ast.target: 如果导入仅添加新的高亮，则自动合并导入，而不显示对话框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically handle all duplicates without showing dialogs. Useful for automated imports via Cron or scheduled tasks.
ast.target: 自动处理所有重复项而不显示对话框。适用于通过 Cron 或计划任务进行的自动导入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Action to take for all duplicates when running in silent mode.
ast.target: 在静默模式下运行时，对所有重复项采取的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Checks the entire vault for duplicates (slower). When off, only the highlights folder is scanned (faster).
ast.target: 检查整个保险库以查找重复项（较慢）。关闭时，仅扫描高亮文件夹（较快）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scan for highlight files or import them into your vault.
ast.target: 扫描高亮文件或将其导入到您的保险库中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override default formatting for highlight notes.
ast.target: 覆盖高亮笔记的默认格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder where your custom templates are stored.
ast.target: 存储自定义模板的保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a built-in style for your notes.
ast.target: 为您的笔记选择一种内置样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control how notes are formatted in templates. "Auto" adds blockquotes if the template doesn't. "Manual" respects template formatting only. "Never" never adds blockquotes to notes.
ast.target: 控制模板中笔记的格式化方式。“自动”会在模板未添加时添加引用块。“手动”仅遵循模板格式。“从不”从不向笔记添加引用块。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Apply to all remaining files in this import
ast.target: 应用于此导入中的所有剩余文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 强制重新导入所有书籍

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Clean up comments from completed books
ast.target: 清理已完成书籍的注释

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每个笔记的最大备份数

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用自定义文件名模板

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用全保险库重复检查

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ⚠️ Warning: 'Replace' will overwrite any local edits you've made to notes.
ast.target: ⚠️ 警告：“替换”操作将覆盖您对笔记所做的任何本地编辑。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Enable 'Log to file' to edit this.
ast.target: 启用“记录到文件”以编辑此项。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Scan path not available. Aborting command execution.
ast.target: 扫描路径不可用。正在中止命令执行。

ast.target: 扫描分析工作进程出错

ast.target: 工作进程返回错误结果

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not list plugin data dir; proceeding with reset.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: File logging is enabled, but FileSystemService is not yet available. Sink creation deferred.
ast.target: 文件日志已启用，但文件系统服务尚不可用。接收器创建已延迟。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 正在删除持久化索引数据库文件。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 使索引缓存失效时出错

ast.source: KOReader Importer: No folder picker API available (window.electron/showOpenDialog or electron.remote.dialog)
ast.target: KOReader导入器：没有可用的文件夹选择器API（window.electron/showOpenDialog 或 electron.remote.dialog）

ast.target: KOReader导入器：没有可用的文件选择器API（window.electron/showOpenDialog 或 electron.remote.dialog）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unexpected pool error during backup migration

ast.name: warn

ast.target: 保存模板出错。请查看控制台获取详情。

ast.target: KOReader导入器：正在后台升级备份文件名。这是一次性操作。

ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.target: 从备份恢复笔记对话框

ast.name: description
ast.source: Remove HTML tags and decode entities

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prefix lines with > for Markdown quotes
ast.target: 在行首添加 > 以创建 Markdown 引用

ast.name: description
ast.target: 转义 Markdown 特殊字符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 格式化日期字符串 (例如 {YYYY}{MM}{DD}{HH}{mm}{ss})

ast.name: description
ast.source: Collapse all whitespace to single spaces and trim
ast.target: 将所有空白字符折叠为单个空格并修剪

ast.name: description

ast.target: 来自您库中的自定义模板。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No return statement found in Lua script.
ast.target: 在 Lua 脚本中未找到返回语句。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Script did not return a configuration table.

ast.name: message
ast.source: This will delete the plugin's index files and caches. Your actual highlight notes in the vault are not affected. This action will also reload the plugin to ensure a completely clean state. Continue?
ast.target: 这将删除插件的索引文件和缓存。您库中的实际高亮笔记不受影响。此操作还将重新加载插件以确保完全干净的状态。继续吗？

ast.name: message
ast.source: A filename was too long and has been automatically shortened.
ast.target: 文件名过长，已自动缩短。

ast.name: message
ast.source: KOReader Importer: Failed to create backup. Check folder permissions.
ast.target: KOReader 导入器：创建备份失败。请检查文件夹权限。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This will permanently remove tracking comments from all KOReader notes in this folder and its subfolders. Continue?
ast.target: 这将永久移除此文件夹及其子文件夹中所有 KOReader 笔记的跟踪注释。继续吗？

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert All Files to Current Comment Style
ast.target: 将所有文件转换为当前注释样式

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force Re-scan and Import KOReader Highlights
ast.target: 强制重新扫描并导入 KOReader 高亮

ast.name: name
ast.source: Troubleshoot: Full Reset and Reload Plugin
ast.target: 故障排除：完全重置并重新加载插件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 故障排除：重新检查环境功能

ast.name: name
ast.target: KOReader：完成笔记（移除跟踪注释）

ast.name: name
ast.source: KOReader: Clean up comments from all completed books
ast.target: KOReader：清理所有已完成书籍的注释

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a backup from the list to preview its content.
ast.target: 从列表中选择一个备份以预览其内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to load preview. The backup file may be corrupted.
ast.target: 加载预览失败。备份文件可能已损坏。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will overwrite the current content of the note with the selected backup.
ast.target: 这将用所选备份覆盖笔记的当前内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Without comment markers, the plugin cannot track imported highlights and cannot dynamically merge new ones.
ast.target: 如果没有评论标记，插件将无法跟踪导入的高亮内容，也无法动态合并新的高亮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These settings control which metadata fields appear in your highlight notes. Check a field to EXCLUDE it from generated frontmatter.
ast.target: 这些设置控制哪些元数据字段出现在您的高亮笔记中。勾选一个字段以将其从生成的前置元数据中排除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add extra fields from KOReader metadata:
ast.target: 从KOReader元数据添加额外字段：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is a sample highlight text. It demonstrates how the main content of a highlight will look.
ast.target: 这是一段示例高亮文本。它展示了高亮内容主体部分的显示效果。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 正在清理已完成的书籍

ast.name: title
ast.source: Existing Note Found in Different Folder
ast.target: 在不同文件夹中发现现有笔记

ast.name: title
ast.target: 完成此文件夹中的笔记？

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Select a backup to enable restore
ast.target: 选择一个备份以启用恢复功能

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Overwrites the existing note. Any local edits will be lost.
ast.target: 覆盖现有笔记。任何本地编辑都将丢失。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Creates a new, separate note for the incoming highlights.
ast.target: 为传入的高亮内容创建一个新的、独立的笔记。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Skips importing this book for now.
